title: 6 sed and awk Commands for Lightweight Text Cleanup
summary: Clean messy text files quickly with sed and awk commands for trimming, replacing, filtering, splitting, and small report-style transforms.

test_environment.runtime: POSIX shell with sed and awk

verification_setup: Confirm sed and awk are installed.
Replace the example file names before running the commands.
Use sample files with known delimiters, whitespace, or field positions.
verification_command: Manual verification only; run the commands from src/sed_and_awk_commands_for_lightweight_text_cleanup.sh with real local files.
verification_notes: Manual verification only. Spot-checked locally with disposable text files that matched the documented delimiters and field positions. Replace the example files and confirm field layout before running.
